user.title: Select Beurer/Sanitas Scale
user.description: Select your scale. After setup, use Configure to pair.

bluetooth_confirm.title: Found: {name}
bluetooth_confirm.description: Add this scale? After setup, use Configure to pair.

abort.no_devices_found: No supported scales found. Make sure your scale is powered on.

init.title: Pair with {name}
init.description: Step on the scale to wake it up, then click Submit. The integration will connect and initiate pairing.

enter_pin.title: Enter PIN from scale display

error.scale_not_found: Scale not found. Step on the scale and try again.
error.connection_failed: Connection failed. Make sure the scale is awake and try again.
error.consent_rejected: PIN rejected by scale. Check the PIN and try again.
